title: calycobolus glaber
intro: Calycobolus glaber, also known as the smooth calycobolus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Calycobolus glaber include its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to treat malaria, fever, and other infectious diseases, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Calycobolus glaber include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety require further scientific study.
